input: Scout the live treasury lane, decide if budget should open, prepare a route, execute one real specialist hire, and produce a judge-ready operating memo.
plan: Normalize user intent from: "Scout the live treasury lane, decide if budget should open, prepare a route, execute one real specialist hire, and produce a judge-ready operating memo."
Scout market structure, signal flow, and target concentration with OKX capabilities before any treasury spend decisions.
Run the OKX Security risk gate before routing capital or opening the specialist payment lane.
Plan the execution lane: Scout -> Trader -> Summarizer.
Use Trader to compare route candidates and prepare a swap-friendly path that can strengthen or preserve the operating budget.
Spend the organization treasury on specialist workers over x402, then write proof artifacts to X Layer.

strategy.headline: Scout the market, route treasury capital, strengthen the operating budget, then hire specialist agents.
strategy.objective: Scout the live treasury lane, decide if budget should open, prepare a route, execute one real specialist hire, and produce a judge-ready operating memo.
strategy.paymentPolicy: Deploy treasury budget into 1 specialist worker call over x402.
strategy.routePolicy: Trader compares OKX trade context with Uniswap AI routing before any treasury deployment.
strategy.scoutPolicy: Scout sees a liquid, community-recognized lane with manageable concentration. Treasury can open budget if the security gate stays clean.
strategy.budgetPolicy: Only spend treasury budget after Scout reaches at least watch mode, OKX Security grants a clean pass, and Trader produces a route worth executing.
strategy.riskPolicy: OKX Security is a mandatory gate. If the scan blocks, warns, or degrades without a clean cached result, the mission must preserve treasury budget and halt external spend.
strategy.proofPolicy: Treasury records why budget was spent, who was hired, and what proof artifact was produced on X Layer.

stack.label: OKX Market Intelligence
stack.summary: Scout sees a liquid, community-recognized lane with manageable concentration. Treasury can open budget if the security gate stays clean.

stack.label: OKX Security Risk Gate
stack.summary: Token safety screening that can pause route execution and treasury spend before the organization commits capital.

stack.label: OKX Trade Execution
stack.summary: Supported chains, quotes, approvals, and swap construction.

stack.label: Uniswap AI Routing
stack.summary: Pathfinding, pay-with-any-token, and execution strategy composition.

stack.label: x402 Settlement Rail
stack.summary: Per-call service settlement between agents in USDC.

stack.label: X Layer Proof Layer
stack.summary: Completion records, receipt minting, and proof-linked evidence.

opportunities.title: Self-Funding Loop
opportunities.route: Scout opportunity -> route treasury capital -> hire specialists -> keep the swarm funded
opportunities.thesis: Scout currently grades OKB as budget-ready, so treasury can convert reserves into operating budget.

opportunities.title: Treasury Expansion Lane
opportunities.route: OKX market read -> security gate -> route comparison -> swap-ready execution
opportunities.thesis: Scout sees a liquid, community-recognized lane with manageable concentration. Treasury can open budget if the security gate stays clean.

opportunities.title: Signal Board Lane
opportunities.route: X Layer signal board -> target match check -> treasury watchlist
opportunities.thesis: No direct OKB match yet; the current board leader is FDOG.

opportunities.title: Operational Proof Lane
opportunities.route: budget spend -> x402 settlement -> registry write -> receipt artifact
opportunities.thesis: Every treasury decision should end in a tx hash, receipt, or exportable proof artifact.

verdict.summary: Scout sees a liquid, community-recognized lane with manageable concentration. Treasury can open budget if the security gate stays clean.
reasons: Target is community-recognized, which reduces symbol ambiguity.
Risk control level 1 stays in the lowest OKX tier.
Liquidity at $56.88M can support treasury-sized routing.
No direct signal is attached to OKB; current X Layer board is led by FDOG.

riskGate.summary: OKX Security cleared the current treasury lane. No high-risk token signals were detected.

steps.title: Mission accepted by Orchestrator
steps.detail: Natural-language request ingested and queued as a treasury-aware execution mission.

steps.title: Scout attached OKX market context
steps.detail: Live treasury wallet 0x90ec52fe001a5b59b356eb55ffb6931b7c37db26 currently holds 0.16 OKB, 9.791875 USDT. Evidence id: 0x162ce73309...

steps.title: Scout graded the treasury lane
steps.detail: Scout sees a liquid, community-recognized lane with manageable concentration. Treasury can open budget if the security gate stays clean. Target OKB holds $56.88M liquidity, $1.11M 24h volume, risk level 1, top-10 concentration 0%. Board leader: FDOG via smart money for $404.31. Evidence id: 0x7efc2e2b1e...

steps.title: Risk gate cleared treasury spend
steps.detail: OKX Security cleared the current treasury lane. No high-risk token signals were detected. Targets: USDT (settlement-asset), OKB (route-target). Findings: USDT supported | OKB supported. Evidence id: 0x93c405617b...

steps.title: Trader prepared the execution route
steps.detail: Fetched a live X Layer quote through OkieStableSwap -> Unknown Uniswap V3 Fork. Price impact 0.19%. The route is ready to support the organization budget loop. Route id: 0xfc8e8deacc...

steps.title: Swap-ready payload prepared
steps.detail: The execution lane now has a live quote for 5 USDT -> 0.05795641825374056 OKB, ready for the final signed treasury deployment step.

steps.title: Summarizer finished execution
steps.detail: Spent $0.005 USDT from treasury over x402 and received a summarization payload back into the organization.

steps.title: Live specialist hire requested
steps.detail: A real x402 settlement is being submitted for Summarizer. This mission is configured to spend real treasury budget on exactly one specialist.

steps.title: Summarizer live settlement confirmed
steps.detail: Real treasury budget was deployed for 0.005 USDT. The settlement landed on X Layer with tx 0xd9449e569301...

steps.title: Treasury recorded task completion
steps.detail: Recorded why treasury budget was deployed, which agents were hired, and what proof path the organization produced.

finalOutput:
Strategy: Scout the market, route treasury capital, strengthen the operating budget, then hire specialist agents.
Execution lane: Scout -> Trader -> Summarizer
Budget policy: Deploy treasury budget into 1 specialist worker call over x402.
Scout lane: BUDGET-READY — Scout sees a liquid, community-recognized lane with manageable concentration. Treasury can open budget if the security gate stays clean.
Risk gate: PASS — OKX Security cleared the current treasury lane. No high-risk token signals were detected.
Treasury loop: Scout -> Route -> Fund -> Hire -> Prove
Lead signal board entry: FDOG via smart money ($404.31, sold ratio 74.19%).

Scout: OKX scout readout: OKB is budget-ready with $56.88M liquidity, $1.11M 24h volume, risk level 1, and top-10 concentration 0%. Signal board leader: FDOG via smart money.
Trader: Trader plan: live quote fetched for 5 USDT -> 0.05795641825374056 OKB via OkieStableSwap -> Unknown Uniswap V3 Fork, keeping treasury deployment capital-aware.
Summarizer: Three-line summary: the request asks for a compact execution story, protocol clarity, and a final output that judges can scan in seconds.

Live specialist proofs:
- Summarizer settled 0.005 USDT on X Layer (0xd9449e5693010ba9a23faf5e29f31bb6d84e3439af6d77f2bd1951b4023c70a7)

Proof lane: Treasury records why budget was spent, who was hired, and what proof artifact was produced on X Layer.
